reason: Widget structure conventions (const constructors, prop ordering, build method shape) — needed for the new clear-button / collapse-toggle widgets in StitchImageStrip and for adjustments to StitchPreviewCanvas.

Local UI state vs Riverpod provider state — confirms the collapse/expand bool should live in a StatefulWidget rather than StitchEditorState, and that the clear action must go through StitchEditorController.clear().

WindowSizeClass dispatch convention — needed when adjusting compact / medium / expanded / large branches of StitchEditorScreen so the canvas-fills-container change does not regress the responsive layout.

Lint rules (const, single quotes, sort_child_properties_last) and widget test conventions — needed for every widget edit and for the new tests covering clear flow, collapse toggle, canvas fill, and icon swap.
